summary: Built and deployed TelegramAutoDownload v2.2.8. Updated AppVersion.cs and setup.iss to 2.2.8, ran dotnet publish release build, copied plugins, compiled Inno Setup installer, created portable ZIP, committed all files, pushed to git, and created GitHub release v2.2.8 with both artifacts. Release URL: https://github.com/il90il90/TelegramAutoDownload/releases/tag/v2.2.8
current_status: v2.2.8 released with smart queue system featuring msgId dedup and sync visibility improvements.
